DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER NAUGHTON, CATHERINE THERESE

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME FROM CATHERINE THERESE NAUGHTON, A/K/A CATHERINE THERESE NAUGHTON FLYNN, TO CATHERINE NAUGHTON FLYNN. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
